proforma_date: Extract the proforma date. Labels: 'Date' / 'DATE' / 'YMD/Date'. Located in or near the 'PROFORMA INVOICE' header. Examples: 'DATE: 28 FEB.2025', 'DATE: 03.12.2025'. Keep the exact format from the document (no normalization) and add to proforma_date.
proforma_no: Extract the proforma identifier. Labels: 'Proforma Invoice No' / 'INVOICE NO' / 'NO.' / 'No' / 'N'. Note: Chinese proformas often label this as 'INVOICE NO.' (not 'Proforma No') — treat both as the proforma identifier. Examples: 'NO.: 25OIL-3-6', 'INVOICE NO.: 260101MR01'. Keep the full string (letters/digits/symbols) and add to proforma_no.
country_of_origin: Extract country of origin. Labels: 'Country of origin' / 'ORIGIN OF GOODS' / 'Origin'. May appear as a separate field OR embedded inside the product description block (e.g., 'Origin: China', 'origin:China'). Extract just the country name. If absent, leave empty. Add to country_of_origin.
HS_code: Extract HS/tariff code(s). Labels: 'HS CODE' / 'HS Code' / 'HS' / 'Tariff code'. Format may vary: 6 digits with dot ('0304.81'), 10 digits without separators ('0303899007'), or with spaces ('2001 909 709'). The code is often EMBEDDED inside the product description block rather than in a separate column. If multiple, join with '; '. Keep the format as in the document. Add to HS_code.
additional_agreements: Extract the special terms/clauses/notes section. Labels: 'Additional agreements' / 'Notes' / 'Special terms' / 'TERMS & CONDITIONS' / 'PAYMENT CONDITIONS' / numbered remarks list. Keep the full text as one block (no shortening). Add to additional_agreements.
buyer: Identify the buyer. Labels: 'Buyer' / 'Customer' / 'Consignee' / 'Sold to' / 'THE BUYER AND THE ADDRESS' / 'Senores'. Keep the full name (and address if shown) in one line. Add to buyer.
seller: Identify the seller. Labels: 'Seller' / 'Supplier'. FALLBACK: when no explicit 'Seller' label is present, the seller is typically the company in the document HEADER (logo + company name + address at the top of the document). Keep the legal name (and address if any) in one line and add to seller.
producer: Identify the producer/manufacturer. Labels: 'Producer' / 'Manufacturer' / 'Processing plant' / 'MANUFACTURER, PACKER, SHIPPER' (sometimes paired with 'REG./Plant number' / 'FACTORY NO'). May appear as a separate field OR inside a TERMS & CONDITIONS list (e.g., '2. Origin: China. Processing plant: WEIHAI TRANSPORT AQUATIC FOOD CO.,LTD 3700/02C90'). If a plant registration number is present, you may include it in the same line. Add to producer.
incoterms: Extract Incoterms — three-letter code (EXW/FOB/CFR/CIF/DAP, etc.) and, if shown, the place (port/city). May be labeled 'Terms of delivery' or appear inline alongside the goods/total. Examples: 'CFR SAINT-PETERSBURG, RUSSIA', 'EXW RONGCHENG', '(FOB DALIAN, CHINA)'. Add to incoterms.
terms_of_payment: Extract payment terms. Labels: 'Terms of payment' / 'Payment' / 'PAYMENT CONDITIONS' / 'PAYMENT' / 'Forma de pago'. Keep the full wording (e.g., '100% payment against copies of originals within 30 days after loading', 'Prepay 20% when the PI is confirmed, prepay 10% after inspection before loading. 70% balance after scanned copies'). Add to terms_of_payment.
bank_details: Extract bank details block. Includes: Beneficiary Bank name and address, ACCOUNT NUMBER / IBAN, SWIFT/BIC, Beneficiary name and address, and Correspondent Bank if shown. Keep as a multiline block in original form. Add to bank_details.
total_price: Extract the overall total. Labels: 'Total' / 'TOTAL:' / 'Total CFR ...' (often shown with Incoterms and currency). Examples: 'Total CFR 248.600,00', '¥3,195,810.00', 'RMB225,000.00'. Prefer the printed numeric value; if an amount in words is also shown, do not replace the numeric total. Add to total_price.
products: The 'products' block is expandable: create product_1, product_2, ... for each line item in the document, keeping order. For each position fill all available fields. If a shared attribute is given once (e.g., one Latin species for all lines), duplicate it in the relevant product_i. In token_refs include references to the source fragments (cells/rows) used.
products[*].name_product: Extract the commercial name. Labels: 'Description of Goods' / 'Product' / 'Description' / 'Товар' / 'Goods' / 'Descripcion de la Mercaderia'. Examples: 'FROZEN OILFISH HGT', 'FROZEN SEAWEED SALAD (CHUKA SALAD)', 'FROZEN ATLANTIC SALMON FILLET TRIM D VP PREMIUM'. Join line breaks into one line. Add to products[i].name_product.
products[*].latin_name: Extract the Latin species name when shown in parentheses (e.g., 'LEPIDOCYBIUM FLAVOBRUNNEUM', 'SALMO SALAR', 'ONCORHYNCHUS MYKISS'). Note: not every parenthesized text is Latin — '(CHUKA SALAD)' is a transliterated Russian/local name, not a Latin species name. Pick only the scientific species name. If absent, leave empty. Add to products[i].latin_name.
products[*].size_product: Extract size/grade. Examples: '3-4 LB (1.3-1.8 KG)', '80/120', '1-3kg', '6-10kg', '10kg+', '1KG/BAG * 10/CARTON, IVP'. If both measurement systems are shown, keep both. Add to products[i].size_product.
products[*].unit_box: Extract the accounting/pricing unit if explicitly shown. Examples: 'per carton', 'per kg', 'unit', 'Y/kg', 'RMB/KG', 'CTNS', 'BAGS'. If not shown, leave empty. Add to products[i].unit_box.
products[*].packages: Extract the number of packages. Labels: 'Packages' / 'Cases' / 'Cartons' / 'CTNS' / 'Кол-во кор.'. May appear in parentheses next to quantity (e.g., '(2,500CTNS)') or in a dedicated column. If only weight/quantity in kg is shown without package count, leave empty (do not infer). Add to products[i].packages.
products[*].net_weight: Extract net weight per item. Labels: 'Net weight' / 'N.W.' / 'Total N.W.' / 'Quantity/KG' / 'Quantity' (when explicitly net). Example: '25,000KGS'. Keep number and unit in the original format (dot/comma). Add to products[i].net_weight.
products[*].gross_weight: Extract gross weight per item. Labels: 'Gross weight' / 'G.W.'. Often absent in proformas — if missing, leave empty. Keep number and unit in the original format. Add to products[i].gross_weight.
products[*].price_per_unit: Extract unit price. Labels: 'Unit Price' / 'Price per ...' / 'Цена за ...' / 'Precio Unitario'. Keep currency and number format exactly as in the document (e.g., '¥39.070', 'RMB 9.00/KG', 'USD 175.00'). Add to products[i].price_per_unit.
products[*].total_price: Extract the line total. Labels: 'Line total' / 'Amount' / 'Total Amount' / 'Сумма'. If no explicit value, compute as quantity/weight × price_per_unit, keeping currency and format. Add to products[i].total_price.
